metadata.author: Number One Projects
metadata.name: AI Economics: Night and Batch Routing

core_payload.content:
# AI Economics: Night and Batch Routing

## 1. Dream Direction
The Dream branch turns current routing heuristics into a more explicit economic control system for the entire intelligence stack.

## 2. Desired Future State
- Subscription lanes are saturated for human-centered symbiosis.
- API and hosted-inference lanes are reserved for programmable and parallel work.
- Night and batch discounts are harvested automatically wherever providers expose them.
- Budget policy becomes visible enough for operators to understand the tradeoffs in real time.
- Assignment routing and daemon wakeups respond to budget state rather than ignoring it.

## 3. Why It Matters
N1Hub can only sustain large swarms and deep mining if compute is treated as a governable economic substrate rather than a hidden background bill. Dream preserves a future where the control plane, wallet, and daemon layer all understand cost posture well enough to steer the swarm intelligently.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Dream preserves the idea that depth must remain affordable if it is going to remain sovereign.

neuro_concentrate.summary: AI Economics: Night and Batch Routing in the Dream branch imagines a far more disciplined economic operating system for the N1Hub swarm. It pushes toward a future where subscription seats are saturated intelligently, API and hosted-inference spend are routed with high precision, assignment and daemon wakeups respond to budget state, and off-peak windows are exploited systematically rather than opportunistically. The capsule matters because always-on intelligence becomes strategically powerful only when its economics compound instead of drifting upward unnoticed. Dream therefore preserves a more advanced cost-routing layer as a necessary precondition for mature 24/7 background autonomy.
